# komodo_tag (Data Source)

Reads an existing Komodo tag by id or name.

## Example Usage

```terraform
data "komodo_tag" "by_id" {
  id = "6627c3e4f1a2b3c4d5e6f7a8"
}

data "komodo_tag" "by_name" {
  name = "production"
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Optional

- `id` (String) The tag id (ObjectId). If set, takes precedence over name.
- `name` (String) The tag name.

### Read-Only

- `color` (String) The tag color.
- `owner` (String) The owner id (auto-generated by Komodo API).
